title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Okobore Town Villagers, Unknown person #7, Garp, Unknown person #8 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu Uuuhhhh!? The weather is always terrible!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of the Samural being powerful, it's also difficult to even enter the country. That must be why they're closed off from the rest of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KyaaaaaAah!! What is this thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's an octopus...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yoooo OOH..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: POPOPON: PON!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Pon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: When did it board our ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: PON: PON..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAH!! There's a school of fish here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A school of fish!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why are there Carp in the Ocean!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: In the

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: Aren't they fresh- water fish!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How are they alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you questioning that right now!? Those carp are monstrous!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Sanji! Do Carp taste good?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. If you soak them in water and cut them up, you can make delicious sashimi. And if you cook them with miso, you can make braised carp stew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could also make tempura, or cook it in sauce!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right! We'll cook one of these guys for our reunion party with zero and the others!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop it, Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WAA!!!! Don't Resist!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Of course it's trying to resist!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lufu Uuffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why are you always like this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't worry, Nami-san!! He'll be fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: More importantly, we need to protect the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is up with this octopus!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAA AAAA AHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The wind is too strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Carrot, Furl the sails!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OKAY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: Look at how clear this water is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's just like the water in rivers that flow down a mountain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't need to look at it!! Those huge fish in the water are too scary....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then... are we on a river right now!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where are these carp heading?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hold on tight, we're being swept away!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Is Luffy Still on Board!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AAAAH!!! What is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, we can't follow the carp any more...

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: They're climbing the water- fall...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why yy?!??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way our sailing ship can climb that!! We'll end up sunk at the bottom of the waterfall!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A waterfall while going downstream!? What kind of waterflow is this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....that's right!! Since this is freshwater, there must be a huge water reservoir at the top of this waterfall!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... is the Wano Country up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huff Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Phew, those carp sure are strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Luffy!! The ship is gonna sink!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All right!! Leave it to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hold on tight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm trusting you, CARP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: NO WAY!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
